title: Supplemented Adventure
description: Modpack aimed at improving the interest of adventures in Minecraft! Find huge structures, new mobs and new items! Plunge into the world of Minecraft with the latest mods!
body:
This modpack will add some new things and rework a lot of the old ones!

![Supplemented Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QCAfJAr8/images/e77621ad31360dd1b472111a2009c22bd70f1112.png)

---

Now, while playing Minecraft, you can enjoy:
   - Updated generation 
   - New structures
   - Improved items
   - Better combat system
  and much more.

Also you can fight with bosses from Cataclysm mod!

![Supplemented Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/46KJle7n/images/848feafcef53993ecfc3e663179e9ef1cb8fa187.png)

You can also play with this modpack in multiplayer mode! Thanks to the voice chat mod, you can talk inside the game with your friends!

Immerse yourself in the world of updated supplemented adventures and discoveries of Minecraft with the most current iodines!

[Check my other projects! ;)](https://modrinth.com/user/StormykS)
